channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Lum1104 /Understand-Anything | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

item.title: alireza0 /s-ui | Go | N/A
item.description: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: truelockmc /streambert | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: A cross-platform Electron Desktop App to stream and download any Movie, TV Series or Anime in the World. Zero Ads and Tracking

item.title: trimstray /the-book-of-secret-knowledge | N/A | N/A
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: Imbad0202 /academic-research-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize

item.title: multica-ai /multica | Go | N/A
item.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

item.title: antoinezambelli /forge | Python | N/A
item.description: A Python framework for self-hosted LLM tool-calling and multi-step agentic workflows

item.title: can1357 /oh-my-pi | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

item.title: teng-lin /notebooklm-py | Python | N/A
item.description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: rmyndharis /OpenWA | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Free, Open Source, Self-Hosted WhatsApp API Gateway

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: dotnet /skills | C# | N/A
item.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

item.title: multica-ai /andrej-karpathy-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: colbymchenry /codegraph | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

item.title: anthropics /claude-plugins-official | Python | N/A
item.description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
